visual: Empty stance with weight on the rear leg, forward hand extends palm-up at chest height while the rear hand withdraws to the hip, as if patting a horse's neck.
motion_description: The sequence begins with the weight shifting backward onto the right leg, accompanied by a 90-degree leftward torso rotation and the extension of both arms horizontally to the sides. The body then slowly pivots forward again as the left foot pulls in to rest lightly on its toes, settling the practitioner into a rear-weighted empty stance. Moving in a steady, continuous flow, the right arm folds inward to bring the hand near the chest, then strikes outward with an open palm at face height while the left arm extends to hold a palm-up position at chest level.
